heaven_major_001.title: Massive Descent to Earth
heaven_major_001.body: Your angels want to intervene massively in the world of men to fix everything at once. Do you allow this descent?
heaven_major_001.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_001.outcome_yes_body: You upset the balance of the world. Game over.
heaven_major_001.outcome_no_body: You keep things measured. The level of intervention returns to 50.

heaven_major_002.title: Silence of Prayers
heaven_major_002.body: Prayers are dropping sharply. One advisor wants to force the faithful to pray through fear. Do you let him do it?
heaven_major_002.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_002.outcome_yes_body: You replace faith with fear. Prayers are cut in half.
heaven_major_002.outcome_no_body: You reject this brutality and prayers return to 50.

heaven_major_003.title: New Cult
heaven_major_003.body: A group of angels wants to encourage a highly spectacular new cult to draw in crowds. Do you support this project?
heaven_major_003.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_003.outcome_yes_body: You support a dangerous spectacle. The cult drops by half.
heaven_major_003.outcome_no_body: You refocus faith on something stable. The cult returns to 50.

heaven_major_004.title: Reduced Free Will
heaven_major_004.body: Some angels want to guide humans more firmly to prevent their mistakes. Do you give them more control?
heaven_major_004.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_004.outcome_yes_body: You give too much control. Free will is cut in half.
heaven_major_004.outcome_no_body: You reject this drift and free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_005.title: Miracles in Series
heaven_major_005.body: You are offered a plan to multiply visible miracles to immediately revive faith. Do you accept?
heaven_major_005.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_005.outcome_yes_body: You make divine intervention feel ordinary. Interventions are cut in half.
heaven_major_005.outcome_no_body: You preserve rarity and meaning. Interventions return to 50.

heaven_major_006.title: Faith Versus Control
heaven_major_006.body: To restore the cult, some want to reduce doubts and questions. Do you let them do it?
heaven_major_006.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_006.outcome_yes_body: You close off faith instead of helping it grow. The cult is cut in half.
heaven_major_006.outcome_no_body: You reject this control and the cult returns to 50.

heaven_major_007.title: Remove Choice
heaven_major_007.body: An archangel argues that a large part of human freedom should be taken away to stop them from losing their way. Do you follow him?
heaven_major_007.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_007.outcome_yes_body: You impose an unacceptable path. Game over.
heaven_major_007.outcome_no_body: You reject this drift. Free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_008.title: Cult Too Visible
heaven_major_008.body: Ceremonies are becoming huge, loud, and almost political. Do you rein them in now?
heaven_major_008.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_008.outcome_yes_body: You stop this drift before it spills over. The cult returns to 50.
heaven_major_008.outcome_no_body: You let these ceremonies take up too much space. The cult loses half its strength.

heaven_major_009.title: Still Listen to Humanity
heaven_major_009.body: Prayers are becoming confused, contradictory, and sometimes empty. Do you sort through them to keep only what matters most?
heaven_major_009.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_009.outcome_yes_body: You refocus the relationship. Prayers return to 50.
heaven_major_009.outcome_no_body: The noise drowns out everything else. Prayers lose half their strength.

heaven_major_010.title: Protect or Let Live
heaven_major_010.body: Some angels want to stop humans from making certain bad choices. Do you allow this overly strong protection?
heaven_major_010.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_010.outcome_yes_body: You smother what was meant to stay free. Free will drops by half.
heaven_major_010.outcome_no_body: You keep the right distance. Free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_011.title: A Sign Too Visible
heaven_major_011.body: You are offered an obvious sign to revive faith on a massive scale. Do you accept this dramatic display?
heaven_major_011.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_011.outcome_yes_body: You turn faith into a spectacle. Interventions are cut in half.
heaven_major_011.outcome_no_body: You reject this dramatic display. Interventions return to 50.

heaven_major_012.title: Praying by Habit
heaven_major_012.body: Many still pray, but without putting their heart into it. Do you impose a great solemn reminder on everyone?
heaven_major_012.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_012.outcome_yes_body: You make prayer mechanical. It loses half its value.
heaven_major_012.outcome_no_body: You choose sincerity instead. Prayers return to 50.

heaven_major_013.title: Popular Faith or Deep Faith
heaven_major_013.body: A very appealing movement draws crowds but slowly empties faith of its meaning. Do you let it spread?
heaven_major_013.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_013.outcome_yes_body: You let faith lose its meaning. The cult drops by half.
heaven_major_013.outcome_no_body: You stop this drift and the cult returns to 50.

heaven_major_014.title: Invisible Hands
heaven_major_014.body: Several angels want to subtly influence human choices to push them toward good. Do you allow it?
heaven_major_014.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_014.outcome_yes_body: You allow a dangerous manipulation. Free will is cut in half.
heaven_major_014.outcome_no_body: You reject this hidden influence and free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_015.title: Too Many Answers
heaven_major_015.body: Heaven is answering human requests too often. Do you sharply reduce direct answers to restore a proper balance?
heaven_major_015.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_015.outcome_yes_body: You restore a proper distance without breaking the bond. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_015.outcome_no_body: You let heaven answer too often. Interventions fall by half.

heaven_major_016.title: Total Appearance
heaven_major_016.body: A group of angels wants to appear clearly to all humanity at the same time. Do you let them?
heaven_major_016.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_016.outcome_yes_body: The world collapses under the shock. Game over.
heaven_major_016.outcome_no_body: You avoid excess and prayers return to 50.

heaven_major_017.title: Drift of Rituals
heaven_major_017.body: Rituals are becoming more important than what they were meant to carry. Do you force a return to what truly matters?
heaven_major_017.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_017.outcome_yes_body: You restore meaning. The cult returns to 50.
heaven_major_017.outcome_no_body: Emptiness spreads. The cult is cut in half.

heaven_major_018.title: Protected Choices
heaven_major_018.body: You can quietly prevent some humans from making serious mistakes. Do you interfere with their freedom?
heaven_major_018.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_018.outcome_yes_body: You protect too much. Free will drops by half.
heaven_major_018.outcome_no_body: You let humans remain human. Free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_019.title: Targeted Miracles
heaven_major_019.body: You can focus interventions on a few specific cases instead of being everywhere halfway. Do you narrow the action?
heaven_major_019.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_019.outcome_yes_body: You gain precision. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_019.outcome_no_body: You keep spreading yourself too thin. Interventions lose half their strength.

heaven_major_020.title: Revive Prayer
heaven_major_020.body: A great gathering could revive prayer, but it also risks becoming nothing but a facade. Do you support it?
heaven_major_020.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_020.outcome_yes_body: The gathering becomes a facade and prayers are cut in half.
heaven_major_020.outcome_no_body: You reject this false momentum and prayers return to 50.

heaven_major_021.title: Hold Back the Excesses
heaven_major_021.body: A religious movement is taking up too much space and is starting to close in on itself. Do you limit it now?
heaven_major_021.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_021.outcome_yes_body: You limit this movement before it fully closes in on itself. The cult returns to 50.
heaven_major_021.outcome_no_body: You let it close in on itself. The cult loses half its vitality.

heaven_major_022.title: Let Them Doubt
heaven_major_022.body: Some advisors want to remove all doubt from the faithful. Do you reject that path?
heaven_major_022.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_022.outcome_yes_body: You protect inner freedom. Free will returns to 50.
heaven_major_022.outcome_no_body: You suffocate conscience. Free will drops by half.

heaven_major_023.title: Help That Is Too Direct
heaven_major_023.body: You could intervene more to prevent great human suffering, but at the cost of growing dependence. Do you increase the help?
heaven_major_023.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_023.outcome_yes_body: You create unhealthy dependence. Interventions are cut in half.
heaven_major_023.outcome_no_body: You refuse to increase that help any further. Interventions return to 50.

heaven_major_024.title: Quiet Withdrawal
heaven_major_024.body: You can reduce heaven's visible presence to let faith mature, or keep answering too often. Do you reduce it?
heaven_major_024.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_024.outcome_yes_body: You step back without disappearing. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_024.outcome_no_body: You keep answering too often. Interventions are cut in half.

heaven_major_025.title: Words Emptied of Meaning
heaven_major_025.body: Prayers are repeated, but they reach less and less deeply. Do you favor fewer prayers, but truer ones?
heaven_major_025.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_025.outcome_yes_body: You recover what truly matters. Prayers return to 50.
heaven_major_025.outcome_no_body: You keep the empty habit. Prayers drop by half.

heaven_major_026.title: Directing Fervor
heaven_major_026.body: You could steer believing crowds toward one single great direction, at the risk of crushing all nuance. Do you centralize everything?
heaven_major_026.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_026.outcome_yes_body: You crush nuance and the cult is cut in half.
heaven_major_026.outcome_no_body: You reject this forced centralization. The cult returns to 50.

heaven_major_027.title: A World Without Choice
heaven_major_027.body: Some want a nearly perfect world, but without real freedom. Do you accept that idea?
heaven_major_027.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_027.outcome_yes_body: You destroy what was meant to remain free. Game over.
heaven_major_027.outcome_no_body: You reject order without a soul. Free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_028.title: Subtle Sign
heaven_major_028.body: Instead of intervening strongly, you can send a faint but just sign. Do you choose that path?
heaven_major_028.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_028.outcome_yes_body: You choose an action that is fair and measured. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_028.outcome_no_body: You fall back into action that is too heavy-handed. Interventions lose half their weight.

heaven_major_029.title: Listening to Simple Prayers
heaven_major_029.body: Many small sincere prayers are drowned out by loud, grand demands. Do you change the priority?
heaven_major_029.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_029.outcome_yes_body: You restore value to what truly matters. Prayers return to 50.
heaven_major_029.outcome_no_body: The weakest voices disappear. Prayers drop by half.

heaven_major_030.title: Closed Devotion
heaven_major_030.body: A cult has become so closed off that it rejects all others. Do you isolate it to protect the rest?
heaven_major_030.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_030.outcome_yes_body: You stop this closed movement before it harms everything else. The cult returns to 50.
heaven_major_030.outcome_no_body: You let this cult harden. The cult loses half its strength.

heaven_major_031.title: Moral Choice or Obedience
heaven_major_031.body: Some angels want to guide humans toward good by removing their hesitation. Do you reject that logic?
heaven_major_031.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_031.outcome_yes_body: You protect true freedom. Free will returns to 50.
heaven_major_031.outcome_no_body: You replace conscience with obedience. Free will drops by half.

heaven_major_032.title: Reduce the Apparitions
heaven_major_032.body: Heaven is too present in some human affairs. Do you reduce the visible signs to restore balance?
heaven_major_032.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_032.outcome_yes_body: You rebalance heaven's presence. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_032.outcome_no_body: You keep acting too much. Interventions drop by half.

heaven_major_033.title: Spiritual Routine
heaven_major_033.body: Prayers are numerous, but more and more automatic. Do you cut some habits to recover what is real?
heaven_major_033.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_033.outcome_yes_body: You break the routine without breaking prayer. Prayers return to 50.
heaven_major_033.outcome_no_body: You let routine empty prayer of its meaning. Prayers fall by half.

heaven_major_034.title: Ritual Without Soul
heaven_major_034.body: Part of the cult has become nothing but outward form. Do you intervene to restore what is underneath?
heaven_major_034.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_034.outcome_yes_body: You restore meaning. The cult returns to 50.
heaven_major_034.outcome_no_body: You let emptiness spread. The cult is cut in two.

heaven_major_035.title: Respect for Human Choice
heaven_major_035.body: You can subtly influence an entire generation toward good, or let each person truly choose. Do you influence them?
heaven_major_035.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_035.outcome_yes_body: You replace freedom with influence. Free will drops by half.
heaven_major_035.outcome_no_body: You let everyone choose for real. Free will returns to 50.

heaven_major_036.title: Immediate Response
heaven_major_036.body: One group wants to respond very quickly to every urgent human request. You know heaven cannot become an automatic reflex. Do you limit it?
heaven_major_036.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_036.outcome_yes_body: You restore a healthy limit. Interventions return to 50.
heaven_major_036.outcome_no_body: You let heaven respond automatically to everything. Interventions lose half their value.

heaven_major_037.title: Back to the Heart
heaven_major_037.body: You can refocus faith on a few things, but true ones, or keep everything scattered. Do you refocus?
heaven_major_037.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_037.outcome_yes_body: You restore strength to the inner bond. Prayers return to 50.
heaven_major_037.outcome_no_body: You let dispersion take over. Prayers drop by half.

heaven_major_038.title: Community or Spectacle
heaven_major_038.body: A cult is drawing more and more people through noise, image, and crowds, but far less through meaning. Do you let it continue?
heaven_major_038.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_038.outcome_yes_body: You maintain the facade. The cult is cut in half.
heaven_major_038.outcome_no_body: You cut away the spectacle and keep what matters. The cult returns to 50.

heaven_major_039.title: Uncomfortable Freedom
heaven_major_039.body: Some angels blame you for leaving too much room for doubt, error, and personal conscience. Do you hold that line?
heaven_major_039.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_039.outcome_yes_body: You protect what was meant to remain free. Free will returns to 50.
heaven_major_039.outcome_no_body: You choose safety instead of freedom. Free will drops by half.

heaven_major_040.title: Heaven's Total Presence
heaven_major_040.body: You are offered the chance to make heaven undeniable for all humans, everywhere and at all times. Do you accept this complete revelation?
heaven_major_040.preview_hint: Use a token to see the effects
heaven_major_040.outcome_yes_body: You destroy the balance between faith, freedom, and mystery. Game over.
heaven_major_040.outcome_no_body: You preserve what was meant to remain alive. Interventions return to 50.
